note: Promoted from iteration 2's convergence shadow. Fixed a class of wrong-shape/wrong-assumption field reads (host_profile {value,source} dicts, skipped-job started_at) + a class-completion (HEAD word boundary) + made the test fixture realistic to remove the masking mechanism.

phase3_findings_promoted.description: host_profile reads {value,source} dicts as str -> stratify dims permanently None

fix_decisions.claim_text: eligible_lifecycles headline counts all census rows incl ineligible/unknown
fix_decisions.evidence: Suggestion. The accurate confirmed/provisional/ineligible split exists in eligibility_state_bounds alongside. Renaming the public field ripples into docs/schema; a deliberate naming decision, not a bug. Parked.

fix_decisions.claim_text: single-launch groups marked CONFIDENCE_EXACT inflate join_confidence_distribution
fix_decisions.evidence: Suggestion. Changing it alters the CONFIDENCE_CLASSES enum cardinality (pinned) or the distribution; a deliberate design decision. Parked (distinct from the iter-4 cross-session collision, which IS fixed).

fix_decisions.claim_text: _select_root_occurrence falls back to occurrences[0] even if not top-level
fix_decisions.evidence: Suggestion, low impact (still cites source-event IDs). Parked.
test_gap. The runs loop is symmetric to the tested jobs loop; low-value. Follow-up.

step_3_5_gate.note: Verified all 3 Important fixes correct; swept the manifest-read surface confirming H3 closes the whole wrong-shape-read class; tests non-vacuous.

skipped_checks.reason: dirty tree at run time; runs clean in CI

phase3_findings.description: lifecycle_id = session-local occurrence_id used as GLOBAL join key -> cross-session same-command launches collapse into one lifecycle, fabricating transport-retry candidates from independent reruns
chained-command taxonomy false-positive: 'cat run.sh && echo' counted as verification (regression from iter-2 chaining fix)
_gh_json OSError/timeout branch swallows gh-not-found silently (asymmetric with sibling breadcrumbs)
_exit_evidence bare exit/rc over-match ('will exit 5 minutes' -> exit_code 5)
doc 'matching pre/post workspace_state' overstates (lifecycle-scoped, no per-launch before/after)

shadow.over_grade_gate: I1 (fabricates false retry evidence) and I4 (inflates launch count) both silently corrupt the measurement, not fail-closed stops; Important grade holds. code-reviewer clean; comment-analyzer no falsehoods; SFH + pr-test confirm iter-3 fixes hold. Important-count trend across shadows: 3 -> 3 -> 2 (decreasing; I4 is a self-introduced regression, I1 the final deep bug).
